title: ajuga lupulina
intro: Ajuga lupulina, also known as bugle, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ajuga lupulina include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Ajuga lupulina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
